subcodes.first_line: O seeker of divine good-pleasure! In the Tradition it is recorded: "Whoso is not content with My decree, let him seek another Lord besides Me." Be thou content with His decree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای الهی در حدیث است من لم یرض بقضاای فلیطلب ربا سواای رضای بقضا
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
